title: Opening for Store Manager at Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd!
